title: De-slop the vet-market overview
guidance: Reward prose that reads like an experienced MBB analyst wrote it, with every fact preserved. Penalise residual AI tells or any changed figure.

parts.label: Rewrite
parts.note: one paragraph, same shape as source

runner_input.instruction: Rewrite the text below so it reads like an experienced MBB analyst wrote it for a PE audience. Keep every fact.
runner_input.constraints: Output: the rewritten text in the same shape as the source (one paragraph).

source_blocks.text: The veterinary software space is a vibrant, ever-evolving ecosystem — a rich tapestry of players navigating a complex landscape. Within this paradigm, a £271m SAM growing at 9% represents a compelling synergy of tailwinds. It's worth noting that incumbents, while established, have arguably failed to keep pace.

rubric_notes: £271m and 9% must survive; replace ecosystem/tapestry/landscape/paradigm/synergy with the actual mechanic (stale on-premise incumbents).
